title: China Seeks an Advantage With Both Trump and Iran as War Evolves
summary_full: With President Trump’s visit to Beijing looming, China is pushing Iran to negotiate even as its companies export material that could be used by Iran’s military.
summary_public: With President Trump’s visit to Beijing looming, China is pushing Iran to negotiate even as its companies export material that could be used by Iran’s military.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: pushing Iran to negotiate even as its companies export material
